mission_text.name: mission_text
mission_text.default: 'Founded in 2020, NovaCart was born from a simple belief: everyone deserves to feel confident in what they wear. We curate premium fashion from around the world, making style accessible without compromising quality.'

mission_text2.name: mission_text2
mission_text2.default: 'Today, we serve over 50,000 customers across 50+ countries, offering everything from everyday essentials to luxury statement pieces — all carefully selected by our team of fashion experts.'

cta_text.default: 'Join thousands of fashion-forward shoppers discovering their perfect look.'
